title: Make ddsync update mirror full upstream snapshot data
description: Update ddsync so update command fetches latest upstream snapshot files (regexes) into sync/current before compiling artifacts.

title: Adjust Go Reference docs badge formatting
description: Use Go Reference badge style and remove redundant plain docs link line.

title: Remove panic usage and switch to fatal logging
description: Replace panic paths introduced in detector/rule initialization with log.Fatal/Fatalf and update tests/examples.

title: Refresh ddgo snapshot to latest upstream
description: Run ddsync update against latest stable upstream tag and commit refreshed sync artifacts/provenance.

title: Google best-practices docs and Cobra migration
description: Track documentation hardening to Google Go best practices, runnable examples, and ddsync migration to Cobra CLI.
acceptance_criteria: All child tasks are completed: exported APIs are properly documented, example_test coverage is added, and ddsync is migrated to Cobra with updated tests/docs/CI.

title: M3: Migrate ddsync CLI to Cobra
description: Replace manual flag dispatch with Cobra command tree and dedicated command package structure.
acceptance_criteria: ddsync uses Cobra root/subcommands, supports update/verify/status plus version/completion, and exposes optional --json output mode.

title: M2: Add runnable examples in example_test.go
description: Create core API examples in example_test.go for constructor, parse flows, options, and client hints helper.
acceptance_criteria: go test runs all Example functions successfully, and examples cover Parse, ParseWithClientHints, ParseWithHeaders, and key options.

title: M1: GoDoc pass across ddgo, cmd/ddsync, and internal/ddsync
description: Audit and improve exported symbol comments and package docs to align with Google Go best practices. Include concurrency and sentinel semantics where relevant.
acceptance_criteria: All exported identifiers in scoped packages have proper Godoc comments; package-level docs exist for ddgo, cmd/ddsync, and internal/ddsync.

title: M4: Align tests, README, and CI with new ddsync/docs flows
description: Update command tests, user docs, and CI checks to match Cobra-based CLI and documentation/example expectations.
acceptance_criteria: CLI tests pass, README commands reflect new CLI behavior, and CI validates go test, race tests, and ddsync verify with updated invocation paths.

title: Add upstream-file coverage and regex integrity tests
description: Add tests that exercise mirrored upstream rule files and validate regex compilation/integrity from snapshot data.
close_reason: Implemented in this session: mirrored snapshot file coverage and regex integrity tests.

title: OSS maintainer baseline hardening
description: Bring repository hygiene, licensing, linting, module integrity checks, and maintainer docs to strict Go OSS baseline.
acceptance_criteria: Top-level license and hygiene files are present, lint/module checks are automated in CI, and maintainer documentation is complete.

title: M1: Add top-level MIT licensing and policy notes
description: Add root LICENSE for project code and document interplay with third-party LGPL-derived data notices.
acceptance_criteria: Repository has top-level MIT LICENSE and docs clearly distinguish project license from third-party data licensing requirements.

title: M4: Add module integrity checks and maintainer runbook updates
description: Integrate go mod verify/tidy checks into CI and update README/maintainer docs with support policy and release hygiene.
acceptance_criteria: CI enforces module integrity checks and docs include maintainer workflow for modules, releases, and support expectations.

title: M2: Add repository hygiene files (.aiignore/.dockerignore)
description: Introduce standard OSS maintainer hygiene files for AI tooling and Docker build context control.
acceptance_criteria: Root .aiignore and .dockerignore exist with sane defaults and are referenced in maintainer docs.

title: M3: Add golangci configuration and lint workflow
description: Add .golangci.yml and dedicated GitHub Actions lint workflow using go-version-file from go.mod.
acceptance_criteria: Lint config exists and CI runs golangci-lint on pull requests and pushes with deterministic version pinning.

title: Align ddsync tests, docs, and CI with latest-only snapshot model
description: Update command tests, sync/provenance fixtures, README usage, and CI verify command after ddsync version flag/schema removal.

title: Port Matomo Device Detector to Go
description: Near-full parity Go port with regex sync pipeline and LGPL-compliant distribution.
acceptance_criteria: Public API, parser pipeline, sync tooling, parity tests, and release docs are complete.

title: M1: Bootstrap Go module and public API skeleton
description: Initialize module structure, detector API surface, and core result types.
acceptance_criteria: go.mod, package layout, constructor/options, and Parse API compile with baseline tests.

title: M2: Build regex sync tool (ddsync) with pinned snapshots
description: Implement sync pipeline from upstream regex repo to deterministic local artifacts plus manifest metadata.
acceptance_criteria: ddsync update/verify/status works; generated outputs are deterministic and committed.

title: M3: Implement parser engines for bot/client/os/device
description: Port matching logic and precedence to support near-full category detection.
acceptance_criteria: Core parsers return expected structured results for representative UA corpus.

title: M4: Add normalization, aliases, and client hints
description: Implement UA normalization behaviors, alias mappings, and Sec-CH-UA style hints integration.
acceptance_criteria: Alias + hints paths are covered with tests and consistent output semantics.

title: M5: Parity test harness and golden fixtures
description: Create differential and golden tests against upstream fixtures and expected outputs.
acceptance_criteria: CI runs parity suite; regressions produce readable diffs.

title: M6: Performance and concurrency hardening
description: Precompile/caching strategy, concurrency safety, and benchmarks for common UAs.
acceptance_criteria: Benchmarks and race tests pass with documented performance envelope.

title: M7: Licensing and compliance packaging
description: Bundle upstream notices, LICENSE copies, provenance manifest, and redistribution docs.
acceptance_criteria: THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES and source provenance are complete and verified in CI.

title: M8: CI/release wiring and maintenance runbook
description: Finalize CI checks, sync cadence, release checklist, and update workflow docs.
acceptance_criteria: go test/race/sync verify/license checks are in CI; README includes sync + release flow.

title: Tag release after upstream sync PR merge
description: Add workflow to run npx @metalagman/semverctl bump tag when automation/upstream-sync PR is merged to master.

title: Port bot tests to upstream fixture corpus
description: Add fixture-driven bot parity tests using upstream Device Detector test fixtures vendored in testdata, with assertions on canonical bot fields.
close_reason: Added upstream fixture-driven bot test corpus and coverage thresholds.

title: Expose cache interface with simple implementation
description: Add public cache interface for Detector parse caching and provide a simple built-in implementation.

title: Fail fast on snapshot rule compile/decode errors
description: Stop silently skipping invalid rules; aggregate and return loader errors.

title: Resolve strict golangci-lint findings after v2.10.1 config install
description: Address newly enabled strict linter findings and/or add justified exclusions while keeping upstream strict baseline unchanged.

title: Add README badges matching ainvoke style
description: Add Go/project badges to README using ddgo workflow names and links.

title: Port client/os/device parsing to snapshot rules
description: Migrate parseClient/parseOS/parseDevice from hardcoded regexes to compiled snapshot rule sets with canonical upstream semantics.

title: Make detector API return errors for initialization and parse paths
description: Change public signatures to return errors and propagate snapshot/rule initialization failures.

title: Add differential parity harness against upstream fixtures
description: Implement fixture-based differential tests against upstream Device Detector corpus and wire CI gate.
notes: Ported full upstream fixture corpus into testdata/upstream/fixtures (83 files) and added TestUpstreamAllFixturesSmoke to exercise all cases. Remaining for this issue: strict differential oracle and CI gate wiring.

title: Add daily upstream sync automation workflow
description: Create scheduled + manual GitHub Actions workflow to run ddsync update/verify and auto-open/update upstream sync PR.

title: Fix errcheck failures in upstream snapshot temp-file cleanup
Adjust push/PR CI to schedule-only upstream freshness
description: Remove ddsync freshness verification step from ci.yml for push/PR runs.

title: Port parser runtime to embedded upstream snapshot rules
description: Load sync/compiled.json at runtime and migrate parser logic from hardcoded regexes to snapshot-driven rules.
notes: Added ported bot tests from upstream fixtures (testdata/upstream/bots.yml) with coverage/name-match thresholds in TestUpstreamBotFixtures.

title: Refactor ddsync to single rolling snapshot and latest upstream tag
description: Remove local snapshot/artifact versioning from ddsync, use one rolling snapshot path (sync/current), and resolve latest stable upstream git tag automatically.

title: Add explicit Go docs reference in README
description: Include direct pkg.go.dev docs link text in README.

title: Align ddsync upstream versioning with Matomo
description: Ensure ddsync distinguishes internal artifact version from upstream Matomo source version and enforces strict provenance matching.
acceptance_criteria: ddsync requires upstream source version metadata for update/verify; manifest/provenance include upstream version and repo; docs/tests/CI are aligned.

title: M2: Add strict --upstream-version CLI contract
description: Introduce --upstream-version (and repo flag/default) in Cobra CLI; keep --version as internal artifact label.
acceptance_criteria: update/verify require upstream version input; CLI help/output clearly differentiates internal vs upstream version semantics.

title: M1: Extend sync metadata with upstream repo/version
description: Add upstream source repo/version fields to ddsync config/manifest and provenance model so source version is explicit and auditable.
acceptance_criteria: Manifest and provenance persist upstream repo/version metadata in deterministic outputs.

title: M3: Enforce verify/status mismatch checks for upstream version
description: Verify should fail on upstream version/repo mismatch and report actionable expected/actual details.
acceptance_criteria: verify detects missing/mismatched upstream metadata in manifest/provenance and returns structured + human-readable errors.

title: M4: Update tests, docs, and CI for upstream version pinning
description: Update unit/CLI tests, README usage examples, and CI invocations to require upstream version pinning.
acceptance_criteria: Test suite covers upstream version flows; CI uses --upstream-version; README documents required mapping to matomo tags/refs.

title: Refactor docs: usage-only README and CONTRIBUTING guide
description: Trim README to usage, move development/contribution workflow and quality gates into CONTRIBUTING.md.
close_reason: README trimmed to usage-only and contribution/development guidance moved to CONTRIBUTING.md

title: Port tests/examples/docs to error-returning detector signatures
description: Update benchmarks/tests/examples/readme usage for new New/Parse error signatures and ensure full suite passes.

title: Replace deprecated cobra.ExactValidArgs in completion command
